title: AI Lead Rescue daily operator view (representational mockup)
description: Hand-crafted SVG representational mockup of the AI Lead Rescue daily operator view. Shows a calm, restrained 'today' summary with new-lead count, follow-up due count, replied-last-7-days count, a small list of today's leads (initials only), a follow-up board grouped by status, and a daily summary panel. Numbers and entries are clearly illustrative; the asset is labelled 'ILLUSTRATIVE' and 'representational mockup' to avoid implying live screenshot behaviour.

licence.terms: Original CorpFlowAI mark. Free to reuse across CorpFlowAI surfaces; do not redistribute as stock or use in third-party marketing without written agreement. This is a representational mockup, not a live product screenshot — must not be relabelled as a screenshot in any surface.

accessibility.alt: Representational mockup of the AI Lead Rescue daily view: 3 new leads today, 1 follow-up due, 14 replied in 7 days; masked-initial lead entries with status pills; a follow-up board grouped by status; and a morning summary indicator.

usage.notes: slot:lead_rescue_dashboard. Anchors the 'what you see every morning' section. Pure SVG, ~6 KB on the wire. Names are shown as initials only; counts are illustrative; no PII; no claimed conversion uplift; no autoplay; no live data binding. If the live operator view ever changes structure, this asset must be re-vetted.
